subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared is verily the Manifestation of the Resurrection and the Herald of the Hour, and through Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر انه لمظهر القیمه و مبعث الساعه و به
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution
